combat_operations.kharkiv_robotic_assault_july_2025: First fully unmanned assault - 30kg explosive robots, no Ukrainian infantry entered fight
combat_operations.kupiansk_school_operation_february_2026: Complex multi-robot assault - thermobaric rockets + 227kg explosive robots, 9+ Russian soldiers neutralized
combat_operations.nc13_unit: NC13 robotic strike unit commanded by Junior Lieutenant Mykola 'Makar' Zinkevych
combat_operations.khartia_corps: Maj. Andrii Kopach commands unmanned ground systems company

deployment_modes.logistics_automation: Roboticized supply chains to reduce casualty risk
deployment_modes.evacuation_priority: Reducing soldier casualty during rescue operations

component_focus_areas.active_development: Greater autonomy, AI integration, battle management systems
component_focus_areas.future_capability: One operator controlling multiple robots simultaneously

key_leadership_statements.minister_fedorov: Robots routinely enter high-risk areas - delivering ammunition, sustaining logistics, and evacuating the wounded where deploying personnel would create additional risk
key_leadership_statements.deputy_minister_churkin: This is essentially a new branch in the development of ground robotic systems - a full-sized unmanned vehicle. We have to reinforce platoon strongpoints with robotic systems as much as possible.
